Sometime in [[3964 BBY]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]], a '''[[Kedorzhan]] [[Cantina/Legends|pub]]''' in the [[Lower City]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] was visited by [[Zayne Carrick]] and [[Marn Hierogryph]] when they were on the run from the [[First WatchCircle]] led by Zayne's [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], [[Lucien Draay]]. While Carrick was skeptical of hiding there, Hierogryph reassured him that the bar was mainly visited by Kedorzhans who had blurred vision for hours after working long shifts in the mines. Hierogryph then jokingly stated that they only had to worry if the [[HoloNet News/Legends|news]] broadcasted smells on the [[Transmitter/Legends|transmitter]]s.<ref name="KOTOR2" />

The [[Droid/Legends|droid]]s working there apparently mixed good [[Drink/Legends|drink]]s according to Hierogryph.<ref name="KOTOR2" />
